data.description: The interactive session watchdog (`doResetWatchdog` in `agent-session-runtime-helpers.ts`) emits a `console.warn` when it fires (`[terminal-manager] [watchdog] timeout_fired`), but produces no log when it is armed or when it is cancelled at dispose time. Operators diagnosing silent-kill incidents have no way to confirm the timer was ever started or when it was cleared. Add structured `console.log` lines at both the arm site (inside `doResetWatchdog`) and the cancel site (inside the `dispose` closure in `agent-session-runtime.ts`) using the same `[terminal-manager] [watchdog]` tag and key=value fields (pid, timeoutMs) already used by the fire log.
